mission.title: kubevirt: [sig-scale] Increase virt-controller QPS and Burst default configuration
mission.description: **What this PR does / why we need it**: With the current default rate limiting configuration for virt-controller, creating 1000 VMs in a 12-node cluster can take up to 23 minutes in total, which is very slow.More info [here](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1kJGXIClq0hOKAgu29LsO--Xc58WYvn_L/edit#heading=h.gjdgxs). Consider the figure above, where I increased the virt-controller's QPS/Burst from the original value of 20/30 to 100/220, 200/400 and 400/600, with a total of 4 scenarios. Note that while pod creation takes up to 25 seconds, the VM creation time with the original rate limiting configuration can take up to 22.7 minutes. Which is not acceptable. After increasing virt-controller's QPS/Burst to 400/600, the maximum VM creation latency was 25s.

resolution.summary:
It would be great if @rthallisey could share his thoughts on this as well.

cc @xpivarc
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
